news.summary: Chagee Holdings Limited, a prominent brand offering healthy and delightful freshly-made tea drinks, has revealed the pricing details of its initial public offering on April 17, 2025. The Company priced 14,683,991 American Depositary Shares (ADSs) at US$28.00 per ADS, before underwriting discounts and commissions. Each ADS signifies one Class A ordinary share of Chagee. The anticipated gross proceeds from the Offering, excluding underwriting discounts and commissions along with other offering expenses, are approximately US$411.2 million. Furthermore, Chagee has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to an additional 2,202,598 ADSs at the initial public offering price, minus underwriting discounts and commissions, to address over-allotments.
news.headline: Chagee Holdings Limited prices IPO at $28 per ADS, selling 14,683,991 ADSs for approx. $411.2 million, with option for 2,202,598 more ADSs.

news.summary: A leading non-bank lender, Carrington Mortgage Services, LLC (CMS), based in Anaheim, California, offers a wide range of loan options and services to consumers, investors, mortgage brokers, and bankers across the country. With a focus on growth, the company's leadership has tasked the CMS Mortgage Lending team with enhancing efficiency and scalability through the use of automation and technology. This initiative aims to streamline the loan origination process and improve operations as CMS expands its reach.
news.headline: Carrington Mortgage Services wins Excellence in Origination Innovation Award from ICE Mortgage Technology for leveraging automation.

news.summary: According to recent data, approximately 50% of cyberattacks led to the theft of data or credentials. The primary method of entry for these attacks was identity abuse. In 2024, the Asia Pacific region experienced over 33% of all cyberattacks, signifying a significant portion of the total incidents. This information was disclosed by IBM in their latest report on cybersecurity threats.
news.headline: 2025 IBM X-Force Threat Index shows large-scale credential theft increasing, with nearly half of cyberattacks resulting in stolen data or credentials. Asia Pacific accounts for over one-third of attacks in 2024.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh, on April 17, 2025, Wesco International (NYSE: WCC) has scheduled its Q1 2025 earnings conference call for Thursday, May 1, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Interested parties can join the call by dialing in at the provided number. Additionally, the live audio webcast of the earnings presentation will be available for access.
news.headline: Wesco International (NYSE: WCC) to hold Q1 2025 earnings call on May 1 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Dial-in details provided.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, a tech-focused platform called Book an Author was selected to join the 2025 Gold House Ventures Founder Fellowship program in collaboration with the New York City Economic department. This marketplace streamlines author searches, event reservations, participation in book fairs, and bulk purchases. The program offers valuable opportunities to startups and includes mentorship, networking, and funding support.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, two nonprofit organizations, GMO/Toxin Free USA and Organic Consumers Association, initiated legal action against Perfect Day, Inc. The lawsuit accuses the company of misleading marketing tactics and withholding vital information about its genetically modified synthetic dairy item, ProFerm. The product in question, ProFerm, has raised concerns due to alleged material omissions and deceptive practices.
news.headline: Nonprofits sue Perfect Day for deceptive marketing of ProFerm dairy product, alleging material omissions; filed in Washington.

news.summary: In MIDDLETOWN, Delaware on April 17, 2025, Earendil Labs, a prominent player in AI-centered research and development of advanced biologics therapeutics, partnered with Sanofi. This collaboration involves a license agreement for two innovative bispecific treatments, marking a significant step forward in the pharmaceutical industry.
news.headline: Earendil Labs partners with Sanofi for exclusive license of next-gen bispecific antibodies for AI & IBD.

news.summary: Zymeworks Inc., a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq as ZYME, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed that they will unveil their financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on May 8, 2025, after market close. The company focuses on creating innovative biotherapeutics for challenging illnesses such as cancer, inflammation, and autoimmune diseases. Subsequently, on the same day at 4:30 pm Eastern Time, Zymeworks management will conduct a conference call and webcast to elaborate on the financial outcomes and offer an update on the company's operations.

news.summary: In Racine, Wisconsin, on April 17, 2025, J OHNSON O UTDOORS I NC. (Nasdaq: JOUT), a key player in outdoor recreation equipment and technology globally, is set to announce its financial results for the Fiscal 2025 second quarter on May 2, 2025, before the market opens. news.summary: In Martinsville, Virginia, on April 17, 2025, Hooker Furnishings Corporation, trading under NASDAQ-GS: HOFT, shared its financial performance for the fiscal year ending on February 2, 2025. With a history spanning 101 years, the Company is recognized globally for its home furnishing design, production, and marketing. The fiscal 2025 fourth quarter lasted 14 weeks, while the full year consisted of 53 weeks, compared to 13 weeks and 52 weeks in the previous year, respectively.
news.headline: Hooker Furnishings saw improved sales in Q4, fiscal year ended Feb 2, 2025, with 14-week Q4 and 53-week FY, in contrast to 13 and 52 last year.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) unveiled a five-point action plan to safeguard stockholder value and combat false information regarding the company and possible illicit short selling. Rumors surfaced post the filing of Form D, with claims of executive stock sales and an imminent reverse stock split triggering immediate speculation. The company aims to address these by implementing strategic measures to uphold stock value and address misinformation.
news.headline: Faraday Future opposes reverse stock split, aims to maintain Nasdaq listing. Introduces 5-point plan to protect stock value.

news.summary: In Cape Town, South Africa, on April 17, 2025, ATFX reaffirmed its ongoing commitment to The Duke of Edinburgh Cup by hosting the inaugural 2025 tournament at Steyn City in Johannesburg. Bringing together golf aficionados from around the world, the event was a resounding success, showcasing the sport's universal appeal and fostering camaraderie among participants.
news.headline: ATFX celebrates 8 years of backing Duke of Edinburgh Cup in 2025 at Steyn City, Johannesburg, South Africa.

news.summary: Bitcoin is predicted to reach a new all-time high of $155,000, inspired by gold's performance. Bitcoin is currently down 9.3% year-to-date, while gold continues to hit record highs. Despite the disparity, both assets are seen as remarkably impressive during the current macroeconomic storm. Bitcoin bulls hope for a breakout to reclaim six figures and beyond. Analysts highlight potential tailwinds for Bitcoin, including a declining US dollar index and high global money supply. Gold and Bitcoin are increasingly seen as global neutral reserve assets. Bitcoin's historical drawdown remains relatively modest at around 30%, showcasing resilience during unfavorable conditions. Bitcoin's performance is compared to past macroeconomic events, showing robustness in modern investor sentiment towards the asset. The article emphasizes that every investment involves risk and readers should conduct their own research before making decisions.
news.headline: BTC targets $155K in copycat move inspired by gold's record-breaking trend. BTC down 9.3% YTD vs. gold breaks ATH. Bullish signals from declining USD, all-time M2 supply highs fuel Bitcoin's impressive performance amid trade war. BTC and gold emerge as global neutral reserve assets. BTC drawdown modest at 30% vs. historical -50% sell-offs. Beware risks in investment moves.

news.summary: UAB “Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos” has released its audited annual consolidated and separate financial statements for 2024, along with the annual reports of the Company and the Group for the same year.
news.headline: UAB "Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos" releases audited financial statements for 2024.

news.summary: In the fourth quarter, Israel Englander's Millennium Management disclosed in a February 14 13F-HR filing that it purchased Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) exchange-traded funds. The $75 billion hedge fund invested in the Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF and the Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF, but these holdings have since faced significant declines. Specifically, the firm's 768,911 units of the Bitcoin ETF decreased from $43.11 to $37.38 per unit, leading to a value drop. The current status of these investments is detailed in a report on a financial news website.
news.headline: Millennium Management's Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs dropped $22.7 million in Q4, with investments declining significantly in value.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global unemployment rate has reached 6.7%, affecting approximately 200 million people. The report highlights a significant increase in youth unemployment, with an estimated 71 million individuals between the ages of 15 and 24 unemployed. The COVID-19 pandemic is cited as a major contributing factor to the rise in unemployment rates worldwide. Additionally, the report indicates disparities in the impact of unemployment among different regions, with emerging economies experiencing higher levels of job losses compared to advanced economies. The findings underscore the urgent need for targeted interventions and support to address the growing unemployment crisis on a global scale.
news.headline: Siemens Energy raises revenue guidance on increased gas and electricity sales.

news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, the 137th Canton Fair commenced on April 15, 2025. This event garnered significant attention with a participation of over 31,000 exhibitors and an impressive turnout of more than 60,000 overseas buyers physically present at the fair. TAILG, renowned for its electric two- and three-wheelers, proudly boasts the largest booth at the fair, showcasing their innovative offerings.
news.headline: 137th Canton Fair attracts 31,000 exhibitors and 60,000 buyers; TAILG showcases electric two- and three-wheelers.

news.summary: The cryptocurrency market in Q1 2025 saw AI tokens and memecoins as the dominant narratives, making up 62.8% of investor interest. AI tokens held 35.7% of global investor interest, surpassing memecoins at 27.1%. Out of the top 20 crypto narratives in the quarter, six were memecoin categories, while five were AI-related. Memecoins experienced a spike in interest around US President Donald Trump's inauguration after launching Official Trump (TRUMP) and Official Melania (MELANIA) tokens on the Solana network. However, concerns surfaced that memecoins were diverting capital from utility tokens like Solana (SOL), impacting their price potential. SOL fell around 48% in the three months post-Trump's inauguration. The crash of the Libra (LIBRA) memecoin, endorsed by Argentine President Javier Milei, led to a $4 billion market value wipeout after insiders allegedly withdrew over $107 million, causing a 94% price slump. Memecoins saw a drastic decline in new tokens deployed on Solana's Pump.fun post the Libra fiasco. Despite the decline in memecoin interest, profitable traders continued to seek speculative memecoin investments. One trader turned $2,000 into $43 million with the Pepe (PEPE) memecoin by March, though missing the peak and realizing over $10 million in profit. Smart investors view memecoins as a separate play from macroeconomic concerns affecting Bitcoin (BTC) and Ether (ETH). A magazine highlighted how memecoin degeneracy was funding anti-aging research.
news.headline: AI tokens and memecoins dominated Q1 2025 crypto narratives, 62.8% interest: CoinGecko report. AI tokens at 35.7%, outpacing memecoins at 27.1%.

news.summary: In recent statistics, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.8%, with a total of 11.1 million people being employed. This marks a significant decrease in the number of jobless individuals in the workforce. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 3.2%, showcasing a positive trend in economic development. It is clear that efforts to boost employment opportunities and stimulate economic growth are proving to be effective. The government is optimistic about the future outlook and aims to continue implementing strategies to further improve these numbers.
news.headline: Record gold prices surge amid trade tensions and Fed Chair Powell's comments, driving up demand for safe-haven assets.

news.summary: New York - On April 17, 2025, Fesarius Therapeutics announced a significant milestone in striking a deal with Regenity Biosciences. This exclusive partnership involves a development, manufacturing, and supply agreement that secures Fesarius Therapeutics with a dependable, extended-term supply of a pioneering class of dermal regenerative templates. These templates are designed for the treatment of full-thickness wounds. The agreement signifies a strategic move by Fesarius Therapeutics to enhance its offerings in the medical field. The collaboration aims to bring innovative solutions to patients in need, with the potential to impact a large number of individuals facing skin injuries. The agreement underscores Fesarius Therapeutics' commitment to advancing healthcare by leveraging cutting-edge technologies. This development signals a new era in the field of wound management, with a focus on improving patient outcomes and addressing unmet medical needs.
news.headline: FesariusTherapeutics secures long-term manufacturing agreement with Regenity Biosciences for DermiSphere hDRT, a novel dermal regenerative template, for full thickness wounds.

news.summary: In Dublin, Ohio on April 17, 2025, epiq Animal Health, a leading distributor, and Interpath Global revealed a significant collaboration established in December. This partnership aims to revolutionize joint health through the introduction of a nutraceutical named 4CYTE™ and Epiitalis® Forte to benefit animals.
news.headline: Epiq Animal Health and Interpath Global present a joint health product for dogs, 4CYTE™, Epiitalis® Forte.

news.summary: After quickly selling out upon their initial launch and receiving high demand from fans, Crispy Chicken Nuggets will make their return to menus on April 24. This comeback comes as Taco Bell looks to permanently incorporate the popular item into their offerings, marking the first phase of their plan to introduce crispy options to their menu.
news.headline: Taco Bell reintroduces Crispy Chicken Nuggets due to fan demand; plans to make them permanent by 2026.
Iranian Foreign Minister: I plan to discuss Iran-US talks during visit to Moscow - Tass.

news.summary: Alcoa Corp, the largest aluminum producer in the US and listed on the NYSE as AA, faced a $20 million surge in costs during the first quarter due to newly imposed tariffs on aluminum imports from Canada. The tariffs, enforced on March 12th at a rate of 25%, were discussed during Alcoa's first-quarter earnings call. The company's CFO, Molly Bierman, revealed that the tariffs had already impacted their profits by $20 million, with projections of expenses related to tariffs reaching $90 million in the second quarter. CEO William F. Oplinger acknowledged the significance of this challenge, stating that about 70% of their Canadian-produced aluminum is directed towards US clients. He warned that the annual costs of the 25% tariff could escalate further.
news.headline: Aluminum producer Alcoa warns tariffs could cost $425 million annually, with $20 million in additional costs incurred. CEO calls it the most significant impact.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025 at 12:05 EEST in Helsinki, UPM-Kymmene Corporation announced changes in its board and management. Tuija Suur-Hamari has been assigned as the new Executive Vice President of UPM Plywood, becoming a part of UPM's Group Executive Team. This change signifies a strategic move within the company's leadership.
news.headline: Tuija Suur-Hamari appointed as EVP, UPM Plywood, part of UPM's Group Executive Team. April 17, 2025, Helsinki.
NVIDIA's CEO Huang: The US curb has significant impact on business - CCTV.

news.summary: In recent data released, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, which is the lowest it has been in the past six years. This decrease represents a total of 700,000 people finding employment. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 3.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations and indicating a positive trend in the overall financial landscape. Experts attribute this growth to various factors including increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing output. Overall, these numbers suggest a promising outlook for the job market and the economy as a whole.
news.headline: TSMC denies shares with Intel, no tech collaboration planned.

news.summary: China's economy is currently grappling with two major challenges: deflation that is causing a decline in prices, and tariffs that are impeding trade. This situation is expected to have a significant impact on Chinese workers, who are likely to bear the brunt of these issues. The dual threat of deflation and trade tariffs is creating an uncertain and challenging environment for China's economy, raising concerns about the welfare of its workforce.
news.headline: China grapples with deflation and Trump's tariffs, posing challenges to economy. Workers face potential harm.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global revenue from the entertainment industry reached $2 trillion last year. The study also found that the number of people employed in this sector grew by 10% to 20 million. Additionally, the research showed that the market for online streaming services expanded significantly, with a 30% increase in revenue compared to the previous year. This growth has been attributed to the rising popularity of digital platforms among consumers. Furthermore, the report highlighted the increasing demand for original content, with a 15% rise in investment in new productions. Overall, the entertainment industry appears to be thriving, driven by technological advancements and changing consumer preferences.
news.headline: TSMC unfazed by global tech turmoil amidst trade tariffs and Trump's influence. #technews

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global population has now reached approximately 7.8 billion people, with the United States accounting for around 331 million of that total. The study highlights a significant rise in population growth over the past year, indicating an increase of approximately 80 million people worldwide. These numbers indicate a steady upward trend in population expansion, with the US holding a significant portion of the overall global population. Additionally, the report underscores the importance of sustainable planning to address the challenges posed by such rapid population growth.
news.headline: Barclays and Brookfield to sell bank's payment unit in a deal.
Iran's Foreign Minister, in Moscow: Tehran has always consulted with Moscow over our nuclear issues - IRNA.

news.summary: The article discusses the declining status of the U.S. dollar as a reserve currency due to market reactions and the current administration's economic policies. The U.S. dollar index has dropped 8.21% year-to-date, with a notable 3.6% depreciation between April 4 and April 14. This unexpected decline has raised concerns about the dollar's resilience in times of global volatility, as it traditionally acts as a safe-haven asset. The study, "Dollar Upheaval: This Time is Different," suggests a potential erosion of the dollar's status as the world's reserve currency if U.S. Treasuries are not perceived as the preferred safe asset. These shifts indicate a disconnect from usual market dynamics, potentially signaling a significant change in global economic linkages.
news.headline: US dollar under pressure with status as reserve currency questioned due to market reaction to tariffs. Dollar index down 8.21% YTD, depreciated by 3.6% between April 4-14. Full story on Benzinga.com.
